overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a forested mountain trail, encountering a horse rider, and navigating cliff edges overlooking a scenic river canyon with a waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail between rocky slopes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt trail through dense forest and rocky terrain

entered.detail: dense evergreen forest lining both sides of the trail
steep rocky hillside with scattered boulders
narrow brown dirt path winding through the forest
prominent gray rock outcrop visible ahead on the trail
green grass and undergrowth alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense pine forest and rocky mountain slopes. The path winds through tall evergreen trees with large boulders and rock formations visible ahead, creating a secluded forest atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail opening toward cliff edge

events.description: horse with rider trots past the character on the trail from behind

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a mounted rider overtakes and passes by

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting past the character and continuing down the trail

entered.detail: first glimpse of the deep river canyon opening up on the right side

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the character approaches the cliff edge, revealing a distant canyon view. A horse and rider overtake the character on the trail, moving ahead toward the overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with waterfall and canyon views

events.description: character reaches the cliff edge revealing the full river canyon and waterfall vista

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge and pausing to observe the waterfall and canyon scenery

entered.detail: deep rocky canyon with river flowing through the valley below
tall waterfall cascading down the canyon wall into the river
expansive grassy valley with scattered trees stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide-open cliff edge with panoramic views of the river canyon and a distant waterfall. The terrain shifts to rocky ground with sparse vegetation as the character walks along the precipice overlooking the scenic valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky descent path toward river

events.description: character begins carefully descending the steep rocky cliff face toward the river

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating down the steep rocky terrain using ledges and handholds toward the river below

entered.detail: steep rock face with natural ledges forming a descent route
rushing river water visible at the bottom of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from walking to carefully descending the steep rocky cliff face toward the river below. The camera follows the careful downward movement along the rock ledges, with the canyon walls and rushing water now closer and more prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the seclusion of a dense mountain forest to the expansive heights of a river canyon cliff. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by towering pine trees and rocky slopes. As the path winds forward, the forest opens up to reveal a distant canyon view, and a horse and rider overtake the character on the way to the overlook. The scene then expands onto a wide-open cliff edge with panoramic views of a scenic valley and a distant waterfall, where the terrain shifts to rocky ground and sparse vegetation. Finally, the camera follows the character as they transition from the precipice to a careful descent down the steep rocky cliff face, bringing the canyon walls and rushing water into closer prominence.
